sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59327" key="kosmopla/sths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοσμο-πλάστης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n59327.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">framer of the world</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:329" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">329</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:526" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">526</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
